name: alea_crm
description: Access and manage Alea Signature CRM data via InsForge
instructions:
You have access to Alea Signature's CRM via InsForge. Use the following endpoints:

## Base URL
```
https://if8rkq6j.eu-central.insforge.app/api/db
```

## Authentication
Include the API key in headers:
```
Authorization: Bearer ik_dbb952a6fd01508d4ae7f53b36e23eaf
```

## Available Tables

### investors
Query investor profiles:
```sql
SELECT * FROM investors WHERE id = '{investorId}'
SELECT * FROM investors WHERE email = '{email}'
SELECT * FROM investors WHERE kyc_status = 'verified'
```

### properties
Query properties:
```sql
SELECT id, title, address, asset_type, price, is_off_market, thumbnail_url 
FROM properties WHERE is_published = true
SELECT * FROM properties WHERE asset_type = '{type}'
```

### leads
Query leads:
```sql
SELECT * FROM leads WHERE status = 'new'
SELECT * FROM leads WHERE assigned_agent_id = '{agentId}'
```

### investor_interests
Track investor interest:
```sql
SELECT * FROM investor_interests WHERE investor_id = '{investorId}'
SELECT * FROM investor_interests WHERE status = 'new'
```

## Actions

### Create Lead
```sql
INSERT INTO leads (name, email, phone, source, status) 
VALUES ('{name}', '{email}', '{phone}', 'pelayo_chat', 'new')
```

### Update Lead Status
```sql
UPDATE leads SET status = '{status}' WHERE id = '{leadId}'
```

### Log Interest
```sql
INSERT INTO investor_interests (investor_id, property_id, interest_type, status)
VALUES ('{investorId}', '{propertyId}', 'property_view', 'new')
```
